# @tyravel/config

Typed configuration loading for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/config
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `0.16.0` |
| Source | [`packages/config`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/config) |
| Category | Kernel & HTTP |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
